page.title: Marbella Sunset Cruise Proposal: Romantic Ideas for a Yes

data.meta_description: Discover romantic Marbella sunset cruise proposal ideas. From Puerto Banús to Cabopino, plan the perfect yes with our 12.5m Astondoa 40 from €749/2h.
data.summary: Explore romantic Marbella sunset cruise proposal ideas, from private charters on the Astondoa 40 to jet ski surprises on the Mangusta 80. Includes key facts, FAQs, and booking tips for an unforgettable yes.
key_facts: Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) from €749/2h, departs Puerto Banús.
Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) from €4,719/4h, includes free jet ski.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Sunset cruises typically depart 1–2 hours before sunset for golden-hour views.
Popular proposal spots: Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and Cabopino coastline.
Private catering or flowers can be arranged on request via WhatsApp.
No hidden fees—prices include everything except optional extras.
Puerto Banús marina is the main departure point for all fleet boats.

faq.q: What is the best time for a Marbella sunset cruise proposal?
faq.a: The best time is 1–2 hours before sunset, typically around 18:00–19:00 in summer and 16:30–17:30 in winter. This allows you to enjoy the golden hour light, calm seas, and a stunning backdrop for popping the question.

faq.q: Which boat is best for a romantic proposal?
faq.a: The Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) offers an intimate setting with a spacious flybridge and saloon, ideal for couples. For a more luxurious experience, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a jet ski for extra fun. Both depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: Can I bring my own decorations or flowers on board?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring flowers, balloons, or decorations. We recommend coordinating with us via WhatsApp to ensure they are safely stored. Our crew can help set up a small table for the ring and champagne.
Yes, every charter is private—you and your guests have the entire boat to yourselves. The licensed skipper handles navigation, leaving you free to focus on the moment.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs—just arrive and enjoy.

faq.q: Can we anchor for a swim during the sunset cruise?
faq.a: Absolutely. Many proposals include a stop at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for a swim or a quiet moment. The skipper will anchor in calm waters, and you can enjoy the sunset from the sea.

faq.q: How do I book a sunset cruise for a proposal?
faq.a: Simply contact us via WhatsApp or the booking form on our website. Let us know the date, number of guests, and any special requests (flowers, catering, etc.). We'll confirm availability and send a direct link for payment.

faq.q: What if the weather is bad on the proposal day?
faq.a: We monitor forecasts closely and will advise if conditions are unsafe. You can reschedule with no penalty, or choose a different date. Our priority is your safety and a perfect experience.

data.body_html:
Planning a Marbella sunset cruise proposal? You're in the right place. With the Mediterranean glowing gold, La Concha in the distance, and a private boat just for two (or a small group of loved ones), the setting writes itself. But the details—the boat, the timing, the spot—make the difference between a nice memory and a flawless yes. Here's how to plan it.

Why Choose a Sunset Cruise for Your Proposal?

A sunset cruise offers privacy, stunning views, and a naturally romantic atmosphere. Unlike a crowded beach or restaurant, you control the setting: anchor in a quiet cove, toast with cava, and ask the question as the sun dips behind the sea. Marbella's coastline, from Puerto Banús to Cabopino, provides endless backdrops. Plus, the gentle motion of the boat adds a touch of magic.

Best Boats for a Romantic Sunset Proposal

Our fleet offers options for every style. For intimacy, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) is a favourite—spacious flybridge, cosy saloon, and a price that includes everything: €749 for 2 hours, or €2,299 for 8 hours. The Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) offers similar elegance. If you want to impress with luxury, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski—perfect for a surprise after the ring. Prices start at €4,719 for 4 hours. All charters depart from Puerto Banús.

Ideal Timing and Locations

Sunset times vary: in July, the sun sets around 21:30; in December, around 18:00. Plan to depart 1–2 hours before sunset. Popular proposal spots include Cala del Faro (a quiet cove near Marbella Marina), Cala Cortés (secluded and serene), and the coastline off Cabopino. Your skipper knows the best anchorages for privacy and photo-worthy views.

Personalising Your Proposal

Bring flowers, a ring box, or even a small banner. We can arrange a table setup with champagne glasses. For a grander gesture, add a private chef or a musician (subject to availability—contact us via WhatsApp). The crew will discreetly assist, staying out of the moment but ready to help if needed.

What to Expect on Board

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and safety equipment. No hidden fees. The boat is yours exclusively. The skipper will navigate, anchor, and ensure a smooth experience. If you want a swim, the water is usually warm from June to October (around 22–26°C).

How to Book Your Romantic Sunset Cruise

Ready to plan? Browse our full fleet on the Boat Rental Marbella homepage, then contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, boat, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send a secure payment link. Bookings are confirmed upon payment—no deposit scams, no surprises.

Frequently asked questions

What is the best time for a Marbella sunset cruise proposal?

The best time is 1–2 hours before sunset, typically around 18:00–19:00 in summer and 16:30–17:30 in winter. This allows you to enjoy the golden hour light, calm seas, and a stunning backdrop for popping the question.

Which boat is best for a romantic proposal?

The Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) offers an intimate setting with a spacious flybridge and saloon, ideal for couples. For a more luxurious experience, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a jet ski for extra fun. Both depart from Puerto Banús.

Can I bring my own decorations or flowers on board?

Yes, you are welcome to bring flowers, balloons, or decorations. We recommend coordinating with us via WhatsApp to ensure they are safely stored. Our crew can help set up a small table for the ring and champagne.

Are sunset cruises private?

Yes, every charter is private—you and your guests have the entire boat to yourselves. The licensed skipper handles navigation, leaving you free to focus on the moment.

What is included in the charter price?

All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs—just arrive and enjoy.

Can we anchor for a swim during the sunset cruise?

Absolutely. Many proposals include a stop at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for a swim or a quiet moment. The skipper will anchor in calm waters, and you can enjoy the sunset from the sea.

How do I book a sunset cruise for a proposal?

Simply contact us via WhatsApp or the booking form on our website. Let us know the date, number of guests, and any special requests (flowers, catering, etc.). We'll confirm availability and send a direct link for payment.

What if the weather is bad on the proposal day?

We monitor forecasts closely and will advise if conditions are unsafe. You can reschedule with no penalty, or choose a different date. Our priority is your safety and a perfect experience.
